hooks.command: [ -f HANDOVER.md ] && { echo '=== HANDOVER.md (baton from last session) ==='; cat HANDOVER.md; } || true

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -Eq 'git +push[^&|]*(--force|-f([ =]|$))|rm +-rf +(/|~|\*)' && { echo 'Guard: force-push or rm -rf blocked. Run it yourself if you really mean it.' >&2; exit 2; }; exit 0
echo 'Before ending: (1) capture any correction as a Learned Rule in CLAUDE.md; (2) overwrite HANDOVER.md with the exact next step.'
